message:
Harden analytics tracking: improve rate limiting, sanitization, and defensive math

route.ts:
- Improve GA API secret sanitization to strip surrounding quotes that may
  leak from env var configs before cleaning trailing newlines
- Add early Content-Length check to reject oversized payloads before
  streaming, and enforce the byte cap in the non-streaming fallback path
- Replace getClientIP with getClientRateLimitKey: when no trusted IP is
  available, derive a coarse FNV-1a fingerprint from request headers so
  unrelated anonymous users no longer share a single "unknown" rate-limit
  bucket

glossary/page.tsx:
- Extract openByKey helper to deduplicate details-element opening logic
- When a hash-linked glossary entry is hidden by an active filter, reset
  filters and retry after a double-rAF so the entry becomes visible
- Add entries/query/category to the useEffect dependency array to avoid
  stale closure bugs

analytics.ts:
- Drop legacy UA- measurement ID matching (GA4 only going forward)
- Add safeTimingMetric guard for NaN/negative performance timing values
- Extract getElapsedSecondsSince helper to consolidate timestamp-diff
  calculations across funnel tracking and eliminate repeated Date parsing
- Guard division-by-zero in progress_percentage and completion_percentage
  when TOTAL_STEPS is 0
- Clamp scroll depth to [0, 100] in trackLandingCTA to prevent negative
  or >100% values from layout edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
